service.name: Tesla Fleet API
service.description_for_ai: Official Tesla vehicle API. Get vehicle state, location, charging status. Control: lock/unlock, climate, horn, lights, charging. Requires Tesla account and vehicle access.

auth.cost: Free for personal use. Commercial requires approval

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get comprehensive Tesla vehicle data: location, speed, battery level, charging state, climate, lock status, odometer.
Send command to Tesla vehicle: lock/unlock, honk horn, flash lights, start/stop climate, open trunk.

command.description: door_lock, door_unlock, honk_horn, flash_lights, remote_start_drive, auto_conditioning_start, auto_conditioning_stop, charge_start, charge_stop

agent_hints.wake: Vehicle may be asleep — call /wake_up first if commands fail.
agent_hints.polling: Real-time streaming available via WebSocket at streaming.vn.teslamotors.com
